subcodes.first_line: O thou diffuser of the divine fragrances! I know that in this journey thou art encompassed by hardship and difficulty, but when thou considerest the outcome and effect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات الله میدانم در این سفر در زحمت و مشقتی ولی چون نظر بنتیجه و اثر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @effort; striving, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
